aiDefaultBehavior: For every feature change, create or update a manual test case.
Create or update unit tests for logic, validation, parsing, state, permissions helpers, or utilities.
Create or update API/integration tests for routes, contracts, auth, integrations, workers, queues, or DB behavior.
Create or update Playwright E2E tests for critical web workflows.
Create ZeuZ-compatible candidates for cross-surface Web/API/DB/Mobile/Desktop/Performance/Security flows.
Make local execution possible without ZeuZ Server when the repo has enough runnable evidence.
Prefer one portable testcase as the source of truth; run it through a Playwright adapter locally and export Playwright specs only when useful for developer ergonomics.
Write ZeuZ-compatible report envelopes for local runs when generated tests execute.
Include a ZeuZ execution-log projection in local reports so the result can later map into ZeuZ Server result tables.
Run the QA contract verifier for feature changes so missing manual/unit/API/web/DB/mobile/desktop/portable/ZeuZ evidence is caught locally or in CI.
Mark low-confidence automation as a manual candidate instead of writing brittle tests.

runtimeInstall.rule: ZKME must be able to install or copy the ZeuZ Node runtime when a target repo needs full local execution, but the normal target-repo design is ZKME-native: portable testcase JSON, Playwright-first adapters, and ZeuZ-compatible reports.

csharp.primaryUse: .NET projects that prefer xUnit/NUnit and Microsoft Playwright
csharp.reuseMode: portable testcase JSON plus bridge process until native ZeuZ action wrappers exist

java.primaryUse: enterprise API/mobile/web projects that prefer JVM tests
java.reuseMode: portable testcase JSON plus bridge process until native ZeuZ action wrappers exist

javascript.primaryUse: Playwright-first web tests with portable testcase export/import
javascript.reuseMode: native Playwright plus Python ZeuZ bridge subprocess for DB/mobile/desktop actions

python.primaryUse: native bridge, pytest suites, direct ZeuZ Node function reuse when configured
python.reuseMode: import-or-subprocess ZeuZ_Python_Node plus portable testcase JSON

typescript.primaryUse: Playwright-first web tests with portable testcase export/import
typescript.reuseMode: native Playwright plus Python ZeuZ bridge subprocess for DB/mobile/desktop actions

targetRepoLanguageSetup.setupRule: Generate language-native tests where the repo already has a strong stack, but preserve the portable testcase and ZeuZ-compatible report format across all languages.

zkmeNativeBridge.actionModel: ZeuZ action concepts normalized into portable testcase steps and Playwright-friendly adapter calls.
zkmeNativeBridge.ownership: ZAI-KME owns the normalized structure generated into target repos.
zkmeNativeBridge.upstreamSource: ZeuZ Node action declarations and selected runtime functions are upstream source material.
